name: Clara AI — Pipeline B: Onboarding → v2 Agent + Changelog

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives POST with account_id and optional onboarding file path. Alternatively use Schedule Trigger for batch.

nodes.name: Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Returns JSON response to webhook caller

parameters.message: Pipeline B COMPLETE: {{ $json.account_id }} — {{ $json.total_changes }} changes applied, {{ $json.conflicts_resolved }} conflicts resolved. Changelog: {{ $json.changes_md_path }}

_description: Pipeline B: Ingests onboarding transcripts, extracts updates, patches v1 memo to produce v2, generates v2 Retell spec, produces changelog. Triggered via webhook or scheduled batch.
